svg.desc: heart-idle idle_0: Generate a self-contained SVG 2D game asset. Use transparent background. No full-canvas background or opaque backdrop. Fit the requested frame size exactly. Set shape-rendering="crispEdges" on the SVG root. Use viewBox matching the requested size. Target size: 32x32. Output media type: image/svg+xml. UI icon asset. Use a centered icon composition. Simple high-contrast icon shape. Readable in a game HUD. pixel art low-resolution readable clusters limited palette hard edges, no soft painterly gradients Composition contract: centered UI icon large silhouette occupying most of frame transparent padding around icon Palette hint: red primary fill. Palette hint: dark red lower shadow. Palette hint: small pink or white upper-left highlight. readable at 32x32 as a heart readable at 64x64 with highlight and shadow readable at 128x128 without text labels Subject: heart. Visual archetype: heart_icon. heart icon heart. simple heart silhouette readable UI icon at 32x32 clear red heart shape small highlight transparent background SVG shape hints: single path heart silhouette; smaller path highlight; optional dark outline. No photorealistic. No blur. No low contrast. No cropped. No inconsistent frames. No busy background. No full-canvas background. No text label. No complex scene. No anti-aliased painterly render. No photo texture. No photorealistic organ.
